examples: His hosts briefed him about the Darwin plan, explaining it as continuation of a longstanding military partnership under the ANZUS Treaty signed in 1951.
Commodore Leavy: the ANZUS Treaty is the key security agreement between Australia and the United States and allows both our countries to assist each other in times of conflict.
The visit also marked the 60th anniversary of the Anzus military alliance between the two nations.
We will be looking back during this visit -- we'll be looking back at 60 years of the ANZUS alliance.
